assumptions.name: Bear
assumptions.description: North America remains weak, international growth slows, and margin pressure persists.

assumptions.name: Base
assumptions.description: lululemon transitions from hyper-growth to mature premium retail: Americas stabilizes, international expansion continues, and margins partially recover.

assumptions.name: Bull
assumptions.description: International expansion remains strong, brand heat improves, and operating leverage recovers.
